description: Fast entity extraction sample for the small sparse model.

messages.content: Extract the key entities from the text. Respond as JSON with arrays for services, teams, regions, and tools.

The search-ingest worker owned by Team Atlas in us-east-1 failed after a Redis cache flush and delayed index refreshes in OpenSearch. Grafana alerted SRE and the issue was mitigated by restarting the ingest deployment.
